Scratch — 6 boats, 1 race, new position-replacing codes (DNS, NSC, RET, DSQ, UFD)

RRS A5.2 (seriesEntries default): boats that did not start, did not finish, retired, or were disqualified score N+1 where N = number of boats entered. DNS, NSC, RET, DSQ, and UFD all score identically to DNF under A5.2. With 6 entered boats, N+1 = 7.

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

All coded results score N+1 = 7 under A5.2.
Rank Sail Helm R1 Total
1st 101 Alice 1 1
2nd 202 Bob 7 DNS 7
2nd 303 Carol 7 NSC 7
2nd 404 David 7 RET 7
2nd 505 Eve 7 DSQ 7
2nd 606 Frank 7 UFD 7

R1 — 1 Jan 2025

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 101 Alice 1 1
